mapper.select: SELECT * FROM common_code WHERE group_code = 'DRINK_CATEGORY' AND is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY sort_seq ASC, code_id ASC

SELECT cc.code, cc.code_name, COUNT(d.drink_id) AS drinkCount FROM common_code cc LEFT JOIN drink d ON cc.code = d.category_code AND d.is_deleted = 'N' WHERE cc.is_deleted = 'N' AND group_code = 'DRINK_CATEGORY' GROUP BY cc.code, cc.code_name, cc.sort_seq ORDER BY sort_seq ASC
